'''zharara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nice|nice]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nice|nice]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zharara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæræræth|zhæræræth]] || [[word:zhæræræj|zhæræræj]] || [[word:zhæræræsh|zhæræræsh]] || [[word:zhæræræ|zhæræræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zharararath|zharararath]] || [[word:zharararaj|zharararaj]] || [[word:zharararash|zharararash]] || [[word:zhararara|zhararara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhararath|zhararath]] || [[word:zhararaj|zhararaj]] || [[word:zhararash|zhararash]] || [[word:zharara|zharara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zharafrafth|zharafrafth]] || [[word:zharafrafj|zharafrafj]] || [[word:zharafrafsh|zharafrafsh]] || [[word:zharafraf|zharafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhararatha|zhararatha]] || [[word:zhararaja|zhararaja]] || [[word:zhararasha|zhararasha]] || [[word:zhararaka|zhararaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhararath|zhararath]] || [[word:zhararaj|zhararaj]] || [[word:zhararash|zhararash]] || [[word:zharara|zharara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhararathal|zhararathal]] || [[word:zhararajal|zhararajal]] || [[word:zhararashal|zhararashal]] || [[word:zhararakal|zhararakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhararaathatha|zhararaathatha]] || [[word:zhararaajaja|zhararaajaja]] || [[word:zhararaashasha|zhararaashasha]] || [[word:zhararaaka|zhararaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhararathan|zhararathan]] || [[word:zhararajan|zhararajan]] || [[word:zhararashan|zhararashan]] || [[word:zhararakan|zhararakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhararathaoro|zhararathaoro]] || [[word:zhararajaoro|zhararajaoro]] || [[word:zhararashaoro|zhararashaoro]] || [[word:zhararakaoro|zhararakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
